name: KpiCard
description: Dashboard KPI tile showing value, label, and trend.

api.name: KpiCard
api.description: Dashboard KPI tile showing value, label, and trend.

examples.title: Basic
examples.code:
<Grid Columns="3" Gap="4">
    <KpiCard Label="Total Revenue" Value="$48,295" />
    <KpiCard Label="Active Users" Value="12,843" />
    <KpiCard Label="Conversion Rate" Value="3.6%" />
</Grid>

examples.title: With Delta
examples.code:
<Grid Columns="3" Gap="4">
    <KpiCard Label="Monthly Revenue" Value="$18,450" Delta="8.3" />
    <KpiCard Label="Churn Rate" Value="2.1%" Delta="-0.4" DeltaPositive="KpiCard.KpiDeltaDirection.Bad" />
    <KpiCard Label="Support Tickets" Value="247" Delta="-12"
             DeltaFormat="KpiCard.KpiDeltaFormat.Absolute"
             DeltaPositive="KpiCard.KpiDeltaDirection.Bad" />
</Grid>

examples.title: With Icon and Sparkline
examples.code:
<KpiCard Label="Page Views" Value="94,210" Delta="5.7">
    <IconContent>
        <Blazicon Svg="Lucide.TrendingUp" class="h-4 w-4" />
    </IconContent>
    <SparkContent>
        <Sparkline Data="@_viewData" Class="h-10 w-full" />
    </SparkContent>
</KpiCard>

mdSummary:
# KpiCard

Dashboard KPI tile showing value, label, and trend.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Dashboard
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/kpi-card

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| KpiCard | Label | `string?` | `` |  |
| KpiCard | Value | `string?` | `` |  |
| KpiCard | Delta | `double?` | `` |  |
| KpiCard | DeltaFormat | `KpiDeltaFormat` | `KpiDeltaFormat.Percent` |  |
| KpiCard | DeltaPositive | `KpiDeltaDirection` | `KpiDeltaDirection.Good` |  |
| KpiCard | IconContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| KpiCard | SparkContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| KpiCard | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| KpiCard | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `IconContent` (KpiCard) — RenderFragment slot
- `SparkContent` (KpiCard) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<KpiCard />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-border`, `--color-card`, `--color-card-foreground`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--radius`
